headline: Jim Cramer Discusses Potential Stock Movement for Corning
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money as he discussed the upcoming earnings. Cramer expects to hear more about the company’s “multi-billion dollar contracts,” as he said: We’ve got an important analyst meeting on Wednesday. It’s Corning, the glass and fiber company. headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says U.S. To 'Guide' Ships Through Hormuz
summary: The stock market rebounded late last week after a short pause. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are at highs while Apple and Broadcom are in buy zones.
